body.title: CC worker IDLE bus listener — receives dispatch envelopes, drives handshake
body.result: CCWorkerListener: poll+IMAP, BaseShim.receive_dispatch wired, tmux inject, 8 tests; T-granny-flip-bus-cc ungated
body.intention: I intend that CC receives Granny's bus dispatch envelopes via IMAP IDLE and completes the two-phase handshake, making bus dispatch end-to-end functional without any tmux send-keys from Granny.
body.description:
The bus dispatch chain (T-granny-bus-dispatch, commit 3149f761) is complete on Granny's side: it sends dispatch envelopes to cc.0, processes ack/started/timeout replies, and has a DB watchdog. The missing piece is the CC worker-side IDLE listener that receives these envelopes and drives the handshake.

New file: devices/granny/cc_worker_listener.py — a standalone daemon:
1. Connects to IMAP via make_bus_connection()
2. IDLE-loops on 'cc.0' mailbox
3. On dispatch envelope: extracts ticket_id + from_device, calls shim.receive_dispatch(env, send_fn=..., deliver_fn=...)
   - send_fn(to, payload): appends reply envelope to Granny's mailbox via imap.append()
   - deliver_fn(ticket_id): checks tmux session 'claude-main' exists; injects '/sprint-ticket {ticket_id}' via send-keys; returns True on success, False if session not found or busy check fails
4. Manages CC.0.available semaphore: does NOT set .false on dispatch (Granny's _cc0_busy() handles that via DB); sets .true via mark_available('CC.0') when no in_progress claude ticket remains (polled after each delivery)

The listener runs as a long-lived process, separate from the CC tmux session itself. Entry point: python -m devices.granny.cc_worker_listener or python devices/granny/cc_worker_listener.py.

**Affected files:** devices/granny/cc_worker_listener.py (new file)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; bus/ owns IMAP — use make_bus_connection() not raw imaplib; OOP-first (CCWorkerListener class with start/stop)
**Scope boundary:** New file only. No changes to daemon.py, shim.py, or BaseShim. The tmux_send_keys fallback in daemon.py stays untouched. DickSimnel listener is out of scope.
**Completion criteria:** (a) Start listener, have Granny send a dispatch envelope to cc.0; within 5s a dispatch_ack envelope appears in granny.0. (b) deliver_fn returns True → dispatch_started sent. (c) Tests: _FakeIMAP + mock subprocess.run for tmux; verify ack sent synchronously, started sent after deliver_fn True, timeout sent after prod exhaustion.
